IT-LockDown Browser – Secure Exam Browser Service

What It Provides?

Blocks access to other applications and websites during the exam.

Prevents copying, printing, and taking screenshots.

Offers a full-screen/single-window exam experience.

Who Uses It?

Students taking exams

Academic staff planning/conducting exams

Step-by-Step Usage

Based on your role

Student

Academic Staff

Installation:

Download and install the version suitable for your operating system.

Login:

Open LockDown Browser and log in with your

KHAS Learn

account.

Exam:

Start the exam on your course page; do not close the application until the exam is finished.

Create exam:

Open a quiz/exam activity in KHAS Learn.

LDB requirement:

Activate the “

Require LockDown Browser

” setting.

Check:

Test timing/attempt/question behaviors by publishing a short mock exam.

Usage Tips

Based on your role

Student

Academic Staff

Test your installation with a

mock exam

before the actual exam.

Close background applications; do not use

VPN/Proxy

.

Disconnect external screens/accessories if connected; a single screen is recommended.

Open a

mock exam

for all students before the actual exam.

Set a

password

if necessary, share it via a secure channel.

Define extra time/attempt settings for students with special needs in advance.

System Requirements

Component

Minimum

Recommended

Operating System

RAM

4 GB

8 GB+

Internet

5 Mbps

Screen

Single screen

External screen off, single screen

It is recommended to restart your device and take a short mock exam before first use.

Frequently Asked Questions

Based on your role

Student

Academic Staff

Application does not open

Close background applications; temporarily disable antivirus/VPN and try again.

I get an external device warning

Disconnect external screen, keyboard, or mouse; try again with a single screen.

Quiz does not appear

Check the visibility/date range of the exam; ensure the “Require LockDown Browser” setting is active.

Define extra time/attempts from user overrides; save changes.
